problem id: ea3f72ee
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  10000110 -> 01000010
  10111011 -> 10010000
  11101010 -> 00100001
  00001110 -> 00000000
  11110010 -> 00100001
  10010111 -> 01000010
  01111010 -> 00100001
  11010101 -> 01000010
  00100101 -> 00010000
  10100011 -> 00010000

query: 11101101
predicted answer: 11010010
